# Seeds for failure cases proptest has generated in the past. It is
# automatically read and these particular cases re-run before any
# novel cases are generated.
#
# It is recommended to check this file in to source control so that
# everyone who runs the test benefits from these saved cases.
cc 511d61d2f16765e1129728195d26305331bb39bded3f7cb18198b5ff0d26a136 # shrinks to filename = "snapshot_1000000000000.png"
cc 0beee3a93777e725c83fe21ec1a1623366718806020a6c8e4b1ccd278b35f71d # shrinks to filename = "snapshot_1000000000000.png", content = [52, 69, 91, 212, 83, 31, 73, 47, 65, 53, 226, 104, 151, 135, 206, 82, 79, 93, 239, 42, 227, 43, 92, 66, 106, 53, 72, 13, 174, 14, 76, 95, 64, 53, 182, 219, 38, 11, 64, 175, 72, 55, 139, 33, 231, 101, 239, 81, 172, 16, 37, 28, 232, 115, 100, 49, 101, 105, 108, 93, 175, 56, 40, 152, 150, 138, 33, 154, 182, 17, 105, 217, 195, 199, 24, 57, 89, 78, 45, 236, 220, 197, 19, 157, 185, 162, 127, 8, 149, 15, 69, 69, 24, 253, 150, 34, 206, 204, 166, 168, 180, 182, 124, 13, 24, 170, 55, 103, 24, 79, 247, 32, 188, 42, 20, 179, 118, 200, 51, 130, 113, 51, 43, 37, 127, 185, 202, 18, 247, 66, 16, 73, 114, 16, 91, 117, 72, 118, 31, 40, 124, 65, 170, 25, 141, 237, 181, 227, 254, 63, 189, 218, 234, 86, 246, 19, 32, 246, 111, 124, 187, 250, 9, 150, 139, 210, 226, 62, 161, 79, 205, 49, 187, 155, 72, 175, 161, 69, 219, 61, 49, 35, 130, 218, 10, 227, 192, 91, 151, 189, 185, 180, 95, 49, 175, 52, 134, 7, 103, 87, 176, 106, 149, 106, 5, 17, 250, 37, 183, 11, 135, 127, 191, 144, 30, 114, 215, 29, 116, 221, 120, 25, 162, 210, 44, 191, 151, 8, 120, 57, 39, 253, 77, 109, 102, 96, 74, 3, 58, 230, 91, 240, 166, 204, 189, 99, 220, 64, 124, 53, 5, 15, 24, 255, 36, 46, 176, 129, 106, 236, 88, 213, 250, 169, 1, 93, 228, 52, 121, 234, 133, 100, 115, 220, 91, 4, 100, 6, 189, 166, 176, 71, 42, 83, 64, 231, 139, 115, 87, 216, 230, 129, 136, 202, 213, 107, 143, 27, 199, 90, 39, 246, 201, 221, 97, 154, 40, 240, 107, 85, 242, 207, 96, 173, 42], cleanup_count = 4
